entry.title: How to obtain my S4HC APIKey
entry.content:
Hi

I started to write this question as I thought I needed the APIKey for a call to this API below.  I am still wanting to know that.

I want to update an element via the API_BUSINESS_PARTNER ... I have set up the comms arrangement sap_com_008 with basic authentication for this test.

According to the API Hub an APIKey is needed - that is in fact not true !!!.🤔

As I can call the API without it and it does the PATCH just fine.  But out of interest How can I get my SAP systems APIKey?🤔

In case you are interested in this part : Here is the API I am calling https://<my sap system>-api.s4hana.ondemand.com:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner('9980000760').     This has in the Authorization tab my communication arrangements userid/password credentials.  The Headers have the CSRF token that I have obtained and it does not care about the APIKey.   The thing does post/patch just fine without it.

 

 

 

Here are the steps etc I took so far to obtain my APIKey

I have set a clientid/secret for OAUTH calls to S4HC API in our SAP IAS Application for our S4HANA Cloud- Test Tenant (i,e, the S4HC D5X system) and the Client Authentication attribute tab - The ClientID was already there and I have added a Secret.

 

 

I then attempt to obtain the APIKey via https://<mysapsystem>-api.s4hana.ondemand.com:443/oauth/token

but I get a 403 - so how can I get my dang APIKey ?

entry.title: Best Practices for Technical Implementation of SAP Business One Web Client
entry.content:
In the modern enterprise landscape, ensuring secure and efficient access to business applications is crucial. SAP Business One Web Client is increasingly becoming the preferred interface for users, offering a browser-based environment to manage various business processes. This article will outline the best practices for the technical implementation of the SAP Business One Web Client, focusing on key aspects like sizing, security, and availability.

 

1. Sizing the SAP Business One Web Client

Proper sizing is essential for ensuring that the Web Client can handle the necessary transaction volumes and throughput. SAP provides a dedicated sizing tool (S-user required) that considers the number of concurrent users and the underlying components such as the Service Layer, Server Tools, and the HANA database.

Key Considerations:

  • The web client itself does not significantly increase resource consumption as the user count grows.
  • The Service Layer and HANA database will require scaling as the number of users increases.

 

2. Security in SAP Business One Web Client Deployment

Security is paramount when deploying the SAP Business One Web Client, especially when exposing it to the internet. The risks associated with unsecured deployment, such as using self-signed certificates or exposing servers directly to the public network, include increased vulnerability to attacks and potential data breaches.

In the desired secure deployment, a reverse proxy is placed between client and SAP Business One server.

 

2-1. Solution Using NGINX as Reverse Proxy

One of the recommended approaches for securing SAP Business One Web Client is to use NGINX as a Reverse Proxy. This method is suitable for both on-premise and cloud deployments.

Overview of configuration steps:

  1. Install SAP Business One components with internal addresses and internal certificates
  2. Obtain a public domain name and a trusted certificate for SAP Business One
  3. Configure DNS records to link the public domain name with public IP address of the NGINX server
  4. Configure NGINX server
  5. Configure SLD in SAP Business One.

[Example: Configuration of b1c_extAddress.conf]

  • SAP provides the tailored NGINX configuration files from the SAP Business One Administrator’s guide - Section Configure Nginx Reverse Proxy.
  • Update the internal address and port for the services as well as the external public domain name and service ports to adapt these configurations to the customer's environment.

 

2-2. Solution Using Hyperscaler’s Service as Reverse Proxy

For cloud deployments, leveraging hyperscaler services like AWS Network Load Balancer (NLB) can be an effective way to secure external access to the SAP Business One Web Client.

Overview of configuration steps:

  1. Install SAP Business One components with internal addresses and internal certificates
  2. Obtain a public domain name and a trusted certificate for SAP Business One
    - Recommend to obtain a certificate from AWS Certificate Manager
  3. Configure AWS Network Load Balancer
  4. Configure DNS for AWS NLB for an external address
  5. Configure SLD in SAP Business One

[Example: involved AWS services for the solution]

In addition to the typical SAP Business One deployment on the EC2 instances, 

  • Configure a Load Balancer to act as a secure end point that routes external requests to internal SAP Business One services on the EC2 instances.
  • Recommend to use AWS certificate manager to issue the necessary SSL/TLS certificatefor the Network Load Balancer (NLB) at no cost. It’s goint to be renewed automatically too.

 

2-3. Utilizing secure endpoint for Service Layer

You can extend the above configuration to Service Layer in both solutions. then integrating SAP Business One with third-party and/or BTP applications/services becomes much easier.

[Example: Extend the configuration to Service Layer for the NGINX solution]

To extend the configuration to Service layer,

  • add one upstream block for Service Layer, specifying the internal address and port of the Service Layer
  • add additional location block for Service Layer, specifying the service path accordingly

 

3. Availability and Load Balancing

Ensuring the availability of the SAP Business One Web Client is critical for maintaining business continuity. This can be achieved by configuring load balancing and deploying additional web client instances.

Overview of configuration steps:

  • NGINX: Use the ip_hash directive in the configuration to balance the load between multiple web client instances.
  • Hyperscaler's service: Utilize services like AWS Network Load Balancer to distribute traffic across different instances, ensuring high availability and fault tolerance.

 

Operations and Maintenance

Maintaining the SAP Business One Web Client involves several ongoing tasks, including renewing domain names and SSL certificates before they expire. It's also essential to monitor the system's performance and scale resources as needed.

Key Maintenance Tasks:

  • Automate renewing a public domain name
  • Update the external certificate and internal certificate before expiry date.
  • Use SAP Business one setup wizard - reconfigure mode to renew an internal certificate.
  • Use third-party monitoring tools or services provided by your cloud provider to keep track of system health and resource utilization.

 

Conclusion and Call to action

Implementing the SAP Business One Web Client with these best practices will not only enhance security but also ensure that the system remains scalable and reliable. Whether deploying on-premise or in the cloud, careful attention to sizing, security, and availability will result in a robust and efficient deployment.

For the step-by-step guide on how to implement this configuration, access the e-learning course on the SAP PartnerEdge portal (S-user required) :

  • Presentation
  • Step-by-step video

Thanks
David

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
Use SAP SuccessFactors Compensation to Provide Pay Equity Adjustments
entry.content:
Pay equity, and specifically gender pay equity, is a topic that often comes up during my requirement gathering workshops.  Organisations are being asked to provide pay equity reports to government regulatory bodies, as well as their own boards, and are seeking guidance on how to include equity as a component in their annual compensation review. 

The below is a simplistic example of how gender pay equity can be included in an SAP SuccessFactors Compensation template.  It uses an employee’s pay grade as the determining factor in a like for like role assessment; however, it is very likely that additional data points will be required in your organisation.  A strong job family framework or job classification, along with a pay grading structure that includes geographical market pay factors, may also be required for this assessment.

It should also be noted that while gender pay equity is often in the spotlight and is used in the example below, other factors that contribute to pay inequity can also be configured using a similar approach.  This may require employees to self report or self declare personal attributes which is usually optional.  In addition, this example uses male and female gender descriptions but additional gender values could easily be included as eligible for pay equity adjustments.

The below screenshot includes a standard compensation review template with a merit increase section that uses performance ratings and benchmarks to provide guideline increases.  I have included a section for equity adjustments which will factor in the current salary and merit increases already applied.

In the Pay Equity Adjustment section, the focus is on gender only.  The average salary for males per pay grade is derived via a report and pulled into the template through a lookup table.  Again this is simplified by using only the paygrade field as your input value, though in a real scenario there may be several input fields.

The gender pay gap amount is populated for those female employees that have a salary after the merit increase is applied of less than the average male salary for that pay grade.  This is calculated as both a monetary gap and a percentage gap.

Average Male FTE Salary – Current Salary – Merit = Gender Pay Gap $

Gender Pay Gap $ / Average Male FTE Salary = Gender Pay Gap %

In this example, the planner is expected to apply an additional increase to rectify the gap.  A custom warning validation is configured in the column ‘Gap Rectified’ to indicate whether a planner should review the gap, if there is no gap, or if the gap has been addressed already.  A soft stop warning is configured here in case there are outside factors that may prevent the employee from being awarded an equity increase (for example, they are on a performance improvement plan). The comment box is configured against the standard Adjustment field to allow a planner to make justifications if required.

The budget for equity adjustments is configured as the total gender pay gap amount for all eligible employees.  Adjustment values awarded are then deducted from the total budget allocation.

Hopefully this simplified example opens the door more complex configuration solutions on pay equity adjustments as part of a standard compensation template.

For more information on gender pay gap reporting, have a look at this EC story report template available for download through the reporting content store - Gender Pay Gap Analysis .

entry.title: Re: SD: Use price from certain MM-info-record as sales price
entry.content: Hello and thank you,

entry.title: Re: SD: Use price from certain MM-info-record as sales price
entry.content: Hello and thank you, that is correct. But as far as I know, SAP will then use the conditions from one of the info records for that material (I think the info record changed last). The source list is not used at all. That is not what we need. Or is it???

entry.title: Re: What Are You Looking Forward to Learning or Doing at Devtoberfest This Year?
entry.content:
I am looking forward to seeing more on transactional RAP Applications.

RAP is a good framework, but there are still many improvements needed from the front end. We still need to use front-end Annotations for a lot of basic stuff. I'm looking forward to learning how we can simplify the development in RAP rather than using front-end Annotations.

I look forward to hearing more about the RAP framework and how we can simplify development.

Why is that? What should I do to see entries.

Best Regards,

Koichi Okamoto

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: OData Connector for PowerBi
entry.content: Thank for providing the steps. I was able to create the custom connector, however as soon as I try to load the analytical model/relational view I am getting data format error. DataFormat.Error: [DataFormat.Error] We found an unexpected character in the JSON input.  Has anyone faced similar issue?

entry.title: Re: DTP failing with error : “odp_prefetch/error 000001”
entry.content: Thank you for your response. We have checked many things before you contacted us and it is now working. This was occurring because we were not aware of the need to initialize the delta when the client was changed and the initialization procedure. As you indicated, we initialized it and it now works properly. Specifically, we deleted all the data from the previous client connection and all requests, including those that were processed successfully, and re-ran the client, and it now works. Thank you very much for all your help. We look forward to working with you in the future.

entry.title: Re: Migration of Old archived data in ECC on Premise to Standalone ILM in SAP RISE environment
entry.content:
Thanks Kailash.

One question. Do we need to have 2 licenses of ILM, 1 for ECC-ILM and one for RISE S/4 HANA ILM (embedded or standalone)

entry.title: #Multivalue Error
entry.content:
I have a report where employees are classified into a stream from the data source. They can be split accross the streams. This creates a multivalue error when I try categorise their expenditure into the relevant categories. 

The report uses two data sources, one for the employee stream and one for the transactional data and they are linked using their userid 

What I want to do is make a decision on to prioritise the manufacturing stream over the professional stream. Is there any way I can do this?

Below is a sample of the data used and the query it comes from

Account Holder (Transaction)Employee Stream (Staff)Amount (Transaction)
EMP1Professional(14.09)
EMP2Manufacturing1.89
EMP3#MULTIVALUE200.00

entry.title: Re: how to get OpenItem (Reference to Items) information...
entry.content: Based on the BO and Node you provide, we try to build custom API for external systems to query. But both the WebService in the PDI or OData Service, BO TradeReceivablesPayablesRegister can not find node ItemOverview. Please help check the reason for this.

entry.title: Re: UDF Setup history item list BP ordered
entry.content:
I suggest you to query sales order table and join it with BP master data table. Similar topic is available here:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/year-wise-sales-report-summary-by-customer-by-month-by-item-in-qty/qaq-p/9912868

entry.title: Re: Chart of Account renumbering after transactions in th...
entry.content:
Please get reference from the following help portal for information on Renumbering G/L Accounts in a 3-System Landscape. In case you use the 2-System Landscape, please click the link in the page.

Renumbering G/L Accounts in a 3-System Landscape | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
Re: Tips for using Transaction PFCGMASSVAL
entry.content:
角色的批量操作功能

事务：

PFCGMASSVAL（= 报表 PFCG_MASS_VAL）权限值的批量维护

PFUD（=报表 RHAUTUPD_NEW）用户主数据对账

RSSCD100_PFCG（=报表 RSSCD100_PFCG）显示角色的变更文档

RSSCD100_PFCG_USER（=报表 RSSCD100_PFCG）显示角色分配的变更文档

SUPC（=报表 SAPPROFC_NEW）生成角色参数文件

报表：

AGR_RESET_ORG_LEVELS 重置手动状态和组织级别内容

PFCG_MASS_DOWNLOAD 批量角色下载（通过 PFCG 上载 -> 角色 -> 上载）

通过 RFC 导入 PFCG_MASS_IMPORT 批量角色

PFCG_MASS_TRANSPORT 角色传输

PFCG_ORGFIELD_ROLES 将角色与组织级别定义同步

PFCG_UPDATE_ALL_ROLES 生成角色参数文件

PRGN_COMPRESS_TIMES 角色的用户分配压缩

PRGN_DISPLAY_AUTH 显示角色权限

PRGN_INFO_COMPOSITE_ROLES 创建生产复合角色的统计

PRGN_STATUS_ALL 状态概览

3) Keep few char for WorkCenter group etc

Br,

Dsk

entry.title: Re: Strategy group 63
entry.content:
Strategy group 63 which used in the finished material or semi-finished material, and the sales order of material will consump the PIR of planing materials.

And for the purpose of the Strategy group 63 will control the lower level component should be purchasing or not before the SO created, so it should not used Procument type =F, thank you.

entry.title: SAP Datasphereの翻訳機能による多言語設定の方法
entry.content:
はじめに​

こちらのブログではSAP Datasphereの分析モデルに含まれるビジネス名や列名などのメタデータの翻訳方法についてご紹介します。

SAP Datasphereで分析モデルやそれに関連するディメンションを翻訳することで、SAP Analytics Cloudでユーザーが設定しているデータアクセス言語に応じてストーリーの表示言語を変換させることが可能となります。

これにより、SAP Analytics Cloudでストーリー単位の多言語設定をするのではなく、SAP Datasphereの分析モデル単位で行うことが出来るため利便性の向上や管理の効率化を図ることが出来ます。

主な手順は以下の通りです。

  1. 翻訳に必要な権限の確認
  2. 翻訳の有効化
  3. 対象オブジェクトの選択
  4. 翻訳の実行
    1. XLIFF ファイルを介したメタデータの翻訳
    2. マニュアル翻訳
  5. SAP Analytics Cloudでの言語変換

翻訳に必要な権限の確認

​翻訳を管理するには、ユーザーが翻訳権限が付与されている範囲設定済みロール (今回の場合はDW スペース管理者) に割り当てられている必要があります。

翻訳の有効化

翻訳の機能はスペース単位で有効化をする必要があります。

スペース管理メニューより翻訳を有効化するスペースを選択し、「翻訳元言語」の選択をします。

注意点として、翻訳を一度有効にすると無効化することができなくなります。また、翻訳元言語の変更はできません。

翻訳対象オブジェクトの選択

「​＋」より翻訳するオブジェクトの選択を行います。

翻訳する分析モデルを選択し「オブジェクトを追加」へ進むと分析モデルとそれに依存するディメンションが自動的に追加されます。

①XLIFF ファイルを介したメタデータの翻訳

メタデータの翻訳には2つの方法があります。

こちらでご紹介するXLIFF ファイルを活用することで任意の機会翻訳ツールなどを使用して翻訳済みコンテンツを生成することができるため、一度に多くのメタデータを翻訳することができます。

​まずはじめに翻訳したいオブジェクトを選択し、XLIFFファイルをダウンロードします。

ダウンロードしたXLIFFファイルを任意の機械翻訳ツールを使用して翻訳します。

SAP Datasphereへアップロードする前にXLIFFファイル内の翻訳先言語の言語コードが正しく記載されていることを確認してください。

確認するためには翻訳後のXLIFFファイルをノートパッドなどで開け、target-languageの箇所を確認します。（以下の例では翻訳先言語を日本語に指定しています。）

翻訳済みファイル名は以下のフォーマットに則って名称を変更した上で保存およびアップロードをして下さい。言語コードに関してはこちらのSAP Help Portalをご確認ください。

  • ＜ファイル名＞_＜言語コード（２文字）＞.xlf

​翻訳済みファイルをアップロードする際にファイル名やファイルに含まれる言語コードが正しく定義されていないと以下のようなエラーが発生します。

​XLIFFファイルのアップロードが完了すると、以下のようにステータスが「翻訳済み」へと変更されます。

②マニュアル翻訳

マニュアルで翻訳をする場合や、XLIFFファイルを介して翻訳したテキストの変更をする場合は翻訳をしたい対象のオブジェクトを選択し、「編集」画面へと進みます。

はじめに「翻訳先言語」を選択し、空のフィードに対して翻訳済みのテキストを入力します。

完了後は右下の「保存」を選択し翻訳したテキストを保存します。

SAP Analytics Cloudでの言語変換

SAP Analytics Cloudから​SAP Datasphereで翻訳した分析モデルを参照する際には、データアクセス言語を変更することでストーリーの表示言語を変換させることができます。

SAP Analytics Cloudのプロファイル設定からデータアクセス言語を「English」を選択すると、分析モデルの元言語である英語で表示されます。

次にSAP Analytics Cloudのプロファイル設定からータアクセス言語を「日本語」へと変換します。SAP Datasphereで多言語設定を追加していることからストーリーを日本語で表示することが出来ます。

さいごに

最後までご覧いただきありがとうございました！
以下が関連するSAP Help Portalです、併せてご確認ください。

  • SAP Analytics Cloud のメタデータの翻訳

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello David,T

Thankyou for this opportunity.

I am Thanuj From India,I have some basic training on SF  and would like to expand my knowledge in SAP SF Consultant in other modules.

Joining the SAP Digital Initiatives Programme would be the perfect opportunity for me to combine my expertise with  technology to revolutionize SF Consultant in the industry. I am enthusiastic about leveraging SAP's industry-leading solutions and innovative platforms to drive transformative change and unlock new possibilities for growth and sustainability. I believe that this programme would empower me to make a significant impact.

Organisations' overall growth and success. Embracing this new challenge aligns perfectly with my passion for continuous learning and desire to contribute to meaningful advancements in the SF Consultant.

Once again, I thank you for this initiative where professionals like me would stand a chance to upskill themselves and help contribute to the success of their organisations.

Thankyou

Best Regards

Thanuj

entry.title: Re: Story report Duplicate records Issues
entry.content: Hi Gloria. I also encounter the same problem with duplicate records in query. It not affects my calculated results in story but heavily slow down my report. I wait forever for it to load. Can I also send you my query to get your advice on how to remove the uneccessary duplicates?

entry.title: How to allow decimal values in ippe product structure node
entry.content: When I create a structure node the have the requirement to enter an item component qty value in decimals eg 0.1. But the system is throwing error that format is incorrect.

entry.title: [Feature]Enabling fields extensibility in the Self-Billing Cockpit API and monitor
entry.content:
Background

This feature enable extension options in SAP Self-Billing Cockpit to give customers the flexibility to: Add custom fields to the Self-Billing with Automatic Posting (SBWAP) API and the Self-Billing with Invoice Creation (SBINV) API.  Those custom fields will display in both the SBWAP and SBINV monitor.

Solution

Introduce new structures "additionalField" in SBWAP and SBINV API each leavel.

The example of of the transmission level:

 

 

        <tran:SelfBillingInvTransmissionMessage>
            <transmission>
                <transmissionId>100001</transmissionId>
                <senderId>EXAMPLESENDERID</senderId>
                <transmissionDate>20210802</transmissionDate>
                <additionalField>
                    <fieldName>transName</fieldName>
                    <fieldValue>transValue</fieldValue>
                </additionalField>

 

 

Billing document level:

 

 

                <billingDocument>
                    <headerActionCode>000</headerActionCode>
                    <externalBilling>EB09061042</externalBilling>
                    <isoCurrency>EUR</isoCurrency>
                    <customerVatNumber></customerVatNumber>
                    <supplierVatNumber></supplierVatNumber>
                    <netValue></netValue>
                    <grossAmount></grossAmount>
                    <taxAmount></taxAmount>
                    <surcharges></surcharges>
                    <cashDiscountAmount></cashDiscountAmount>
                    <fixedValueDate></fixedValueDate>
                    <documentDate>20210902</documentDate>
                    <additionalField>
                        <fieldName>docName</fieldName>
                        <fieldValue>docValue</fieldValue>
                    </additionalField>

 

 

Delivery Level:

 

 

                    <deliveryHeader>
                        <delivery>80000471</delivery>
                        <externalDeliveryNote></externalDeliveryNote>
                        <deliveryRelevanceDate></deliveryRelevanceDate>
                        <customerPlant>CP03</customerPlant>
                        <customerUnloadingPoint>UP03</customerUnloadingPoint>
                        <customerSupplier>SP03</customerSupplier>
                        <soldToParty>24100003</soldToParty>
                        <goodsReceiptDate></goodsReceiptDate>
                        <serviceRenderedDate></serviceRenderedDate>
                        <shippingDate></shippingDate>
                        <deliveryTaxAmount></deliveryTaxAmount>
                        <deliveryGrossAmount></deliveryGrossAmount>
                        <additionalField>
                            <fieldName>deliveryName</fieldName>
                            <fieldValue>deliveryValue</fieldValue>
                        </additionalField>

 

 

Item level:

 

 

                        <billingItem>
                            <itemActionCode>091</itemActionCode>
                            <quantity>3</quantity>
                            <isoUnitOfMeasure>EA</isoUnitOfMeasure>
                            <netValue>60</netValue>
                            <grossAmount></grossAmount>
                            <price>20</price>
                            <priceUnit>1</priceUnit>
                            <priceIsoUoM>PCE</priceIsoUoM>
                            <taxAmount>12.6</taxAmount>
                            <taxRate>21</taxRate>
                            <product></product>
                            <customerMaterial>8001</customerMaterial>
                            <newPrice></newPrice>
                            <newPriceUnit></newPriceUnit>
                            <priceDifference></priceDifference>
                            <priceValidFromDate></priceValidFromDate>
                            <additionalField>
                                <fieldName>itemName</fieldName>
                                <fieldValue>itemValue</fieldValue>
                            </additionalField>

 

 

There is one example in SBWAP monitor

Add custom field in transmission level

Field show in SBWAP monitor object page

Add custom fields in "sddocument" level. In this case , we add multiple custom fields.

The custom fields will show both in list page and object page

Add custom field in item level

The custom field will show in history page

Blog Post Series for SAP Self-Billing Cockpit



  • SAP Self-Billing Cockpit

 

  • How to Set Up Integration Between SAP Self-Billing Cockpit and SAP S/4HANA

 

  • How to Set Up Cloud Connector

 

  • How to Set Up a Custom Identity Provider

 

  • Self-Billing with Invoice Creation

 

  • Self-Billing Cockpit Q&A

 

  • [Feature]Automatic Execution of Self-Billing

 

  • [Feature]Comparison of Tax in Self-Billing with Automated Posting

 

  • [Feature]Main reference duplicate checks in self-billing with automatic posting

 

  • [Feature]Support for multiple pricing types in the copying control for billing

 

  • [Feature]Customize self-billing processing

 

  • [Feature]Side-by-side extensiblity to adjust the received transmission(ABAP)

  4. SAP Fiori

    Eagerly waiting for Devtoberfest. 😄

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page

entry.title: Can Anyone tell me how to use this following BAPI to create multiple inforecords?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am working on a program where I am uploading an excel file and posting the data into the bapi  me_inforecord_maintain_multi  .

But Inforecords Number not getting generated from the bapi, though sy-subrc = 0 after the bapi execution!

Below Posting my code. For each item there should be unique inforecods number, means for 5 materials in the file there should be 5 infnr.

Getting bapi lt_return table message as "material is not activated" .

Tried with leading zeros in matnr , still not working.

 


  CALL FUNCTION 'ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE'
    EXPORTING
      filename                = p_file
      i_begin_col             = '1'
      i_begin_row             = p_brow
      i_end_col               = '170'
      i_end_row               = p_erow
    TABLES
      intern                  = it_exload
    EXCEPTIONS
      inconsistent_parameters = 1
      upload_ole              = 2
      OTHERS                  = 3.

  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'Problem in excel sheet'  TYPE 'E'.
    LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
  ENDIF.

  SELECT zno
      FROM zinfo
      ORDER BY zno DESCENDING
      INTO @DATA(l_sl)
      UP TO 1 ROWS.
  ENDSELECT.

  l_sl = l_sl + 1.

  CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT'
    EXPORTING
      input  = l_sl
    IMPORTING
      output = l_sl.

  SORT it_exload BY row col.

  LOOP AT it_exload INTO wa_exload.

    CASE wa_exload-col.
      WHEN '0001'.
        lw_acc-matnr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0002'.
        lw_acc-lifnr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0003'.
        lw_acc-ekorg = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0004'.
        lw_acc-werks = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0005'.
        lw_acc-ekgrp = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0006'.
        lw_acc-aplfz = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0007'.
        CALL FUNCTION 'KCD_EXCEL_DATE_CONVERT'
          EXPORTING
            excel_date  = wa_exload-value
            date_format = 'TMJ'
          IMPORTING
            sap_date    = wa_exload-value.

        lw_acc-valid_from = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0008'.
        lw_acc-waers = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0009'.
        lw_acc-netpr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0010'.
        lw_acc-peinh = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0011'.
        lw_acc-bprme = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0012'.
        lw_acc-bpumz = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0013'.
        lw_acc-bpumn = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0014'.
        lw_acc-lmein = wa_exload-value.

    ENDCASE.

    AT END OF row.


      lw_acc-zno = l_sl.
      lw_acc-vaild_to = '99991231'.
      lw_acc-kschl = 'PB00'.

      APPEND lw_acc TO lt_acc.
      CLEAR lw_acc.
    ENDAT.

  ENDLOOP.


  SELECT
          a~matnr,
          b~meins

    FROM @LT_acc AS a INNER JOIN
    mara AS b
    ON
      ltrim( a~matnr, '0' ) = ltrim( b~matnr, '0' )
    INTO TABLE @DATA(it_unit).




  LOOP AT lt_acc INTO DATA(wa_acc).

    IF wa_acc-matnr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-lifnr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-ekorg IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-werks IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-ekgrp IS INITIAL
    OR wa_acc-valid_from IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-waers IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-netpr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-peinh IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-bprme IS INITIAL .

      MESSAGE 'Please fill All manadatory Fields' TYPE 'E'.
      LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
    ENDIF.

    READ TABLE it_unit INTO DATA(wa_unit) WITH  KEY matnr = wa_acc-matnr.

    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_CUNIT_OUTPUT'
      EXPORTING
        input    = wa_unit-meins
        language = sy-langu
      IMPORTING
        output   = wa_unit-meins.


    IF sy-subrc = 0.

      IF wa_unit-meins <> wa_acc-bprme.
        IF wa_acc-bpumz IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-bpumn IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-lmein IS INITIAL.
          MESSAGE 'Please fill All manadatory Fields' TYPE 'E'.
          LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.

    ENDIF.

  ENDLOOP.




  LOOP AT lt_acc INTO DATA(wa).


    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' EXPORTING input = wa-matnr IMPORTING output = wa-matnr.
    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' EXPORTING input = wa-lifnr IMPORTING output = wa-lifnr.



APPEND VALUE #( material =  wa-matnr
                vendor =   wa-lifnr )
 TO itab1.

APPEND VALUE #( material =  'X'
                vendor =   'X' )
 TO itab2.

APPEND VALUE #( purch_org = wa-ekorg  plant = wa-werks pur_group = wa-ekgrp plnd_delry = wa-aplfz gr_basediv = 'X' )
 TO itab3.
APPEND VALUE #( purch_org = 'X'  plant = 'X' pur_group = 'X' plnd_delry = 'X' gr_basediv = 'X' )
 TO itab4.
APPEND VALUE #( valid_from = wa-valid_from valid_to = wa-vaild_to  )
 TO itab5.


  CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_CUNIT_INPUT'
      EXPORTING
        input    = wa-lmein
        language = sy-langu
      IMPORTING
        output   = wa-lmein.


APPEND VALUE #( cond_type = wa-kschl currency = wa-waers cond_value = wa-netpr  cond_p_unt  = wa-peinh
cond_unit = wa-bprme numerator = wa-bpumz  denominator = wa-bpumn base_uom = wa-lmein )
 TO itab6.


    MODIFY lt_acc FROM wa.


  ENDLOOP.




  CALL FUNCTION 'ME_INFORECORD_MAINTAIN_MULTI'
    IMPORTING
      et_eina       = lt_eina_e
      et_eine       = lt_eine_e
    TABLES
      t_eina        = itab1
      t_einax       = itab2
      t_eine        = itab3
      t_einex       = itab4
      cond_validity = itab5
      condition     = itab6
      return        = lt_return.











  IF sy-subrc = 0.

    LOOP AT lt_acc ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>).

      READ TABLE lt_eina_e ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs1>) WITH  KEY material = <fs>-matnr.

      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        <fs>-infnr = <fs1>-info_rec.
      ENDIF.

    ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: Bank Guarantee configuration - treasury management

entry.title: Re: EAM planning bucket
entry.content:
Hi, 

Check your plant and other scope details maintained for the planning bucket. Are there orders created for the technical object 1234 in your system? The data is picked based on the scope defined while creating the bucket. 

Refer to the SAP help documentation on understanding the concept of Planning Buckets. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e72f747389b340229f7fa343975bfa57/9f8af92329054abb981aef4c826ffb36.html?q=planning%20bucket 

hope it helps

Sammar

entry.title: Google Captcha is not triggering for forgot password screen
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have added Captcha on forgot password screen where we submit email to request the password reset link.

however the captcha is not getting loaded on forgot password screen but it shows on password reset screen. 

We have RBA rule configured for password reset. added captcha widget on both forgot password and password reset screen.

Is there any limitation that we cant use captcha with forgot password screen?

We are trying to implement this on forgot password screen because if try mail bombing on this screen it is not triggering API rate limit.

your thoughts would be appreciated.

Thanks

Hi Juan,

You may assign the APCC in the general settings tab of OVP. Please refer below snapshot.

entry.title: Hide Overtime Hours from Employee Time Sheets
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Employees should not be able to see any extra hours they have worked beyond the standard 8 hours on their timesheets. For instance, if an employee works more than 8 hours in a day, the additional hours should not be visible on their timesheet.

Please let us know the feasibility of the standard working hours are displayed to employees.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
entry.content:
Line Item View:

Identification View:

entry.title: In Job information, visibility of Reporting managers field should be based on plant/mines/office
entry.content:
Hi Community,

The requirement here is to ensure that HR personnel can only view relevant employee details, restriction on event reasons based on the Plant, Mines, or Office.

For example: When an HR representative is attempting to change the Reporting Manager (RM) for employees at a specific Plant, the system should be configured to prevent the display of employees from other Plants, Mines, or Offices in the search field. This restriction would ensure that HR personnel can only access and modify information pertinent to the specific location they are working with. 

Thankyou.

entry.title: Email id issue in the contact person UIBB in MDG.
entry.content:
The data flowing from form UIBB to List UIBB in customer master data. After entering the required data in the contact person including email and after clicking on done, the email id from the form uibb is not flowing to the list UIBB of the contact person in the overview page.

If anyone faced similar data flow issue please help me to get the solution.

Regards,
Shabari.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano, I'm looking forward to boost my professional career path with SAP knowledges that support my experience as FICO consultant. Recently, I've completed the two useful learning journeys as below:

  • Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA
  • Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

I'm excited to try out for a free certification because I think it will enable me to learn more and advance in my career. I'm aware that technology is a constantly evolvement so I try to keep up with the most recent developments. I am appreciative of the chance and enthusiastic about the opportunities that lie ahead. I appreciate you taking a look at my request for a free certification.

Thank you a lot.

entry.title: Re: Open documents exclude all orders with date 01-01 (al...
entry.content:
Hi Jeroen,

I would do it in that way

AND
DAY(T0.DocDate) + Month(T0.DocDate) <> 2

otherwise you wouldn't get every first of a month or january

regards Lothar

entry.title: Restricting Employee Visibility in Reporting Matrix: Limit Access to Hierarchical Levels Above HOD
entry.content:
Hi Community,

The requirement is regarding visibility in the reporting matrix org chart. Employees should only be able to view positions up to two levels above their own within the reporting hierarchy, specifically not beyond the Head of Department (HOD).

  • Employees should have visibility into their direct reporting lines and up to two levels higher in Org chart.
  • Access to positions above the HOD will be restricted to ensure a clear and focused view within the reporting structure.
  • For Example: If Rahul is an employee with Ayaskant as his reporting manager, and Ayaskant's reporting manager is Jayashree, Rahul will be able to view positions up to and including Jayashree in the organizational chart. He will not have access to view positions above Jayashree.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
entry.content: Object page displaying the details of the selected record including Criticality representation of the Status field

entry.title: Restricting Employee Visibility: Preventing Access to Reporting Manager's Peers
entry.content:
Hi Community,

The requirement is here to restrict access within organizational chart. Employees shall not be able to view positions that are at the same hierarchical level as their reporting manager.

For Example: If Rahul is an employee with Ayaskant as his reporting manager, Rahul will be able to view positions up to Ayaskant in the organizational chart. However, Rahul will not have access to view the positions of Ayaskant’s peers who are at the same level as Ayaskant.

Key Details:

  • Employees will have visibility into their direct reporting lines and up to their reporting manager.
  • Access to positions at the same level as the reporting manager will be restricted.

 

Thank you.

Hi 

This is S/4 HANA 2023 OP.

appreciate your help

regards

entry.title: Re: how to Integrate HID Fingerprint Reader in SAP UI5/Fiori and CAP in BAS
entry.content: This error does not seem to be related to SAP UI5. Doing a quick Google search shows similar errors from other users. I'd suggest to first make it work and solve the issue in a plain .html file and once it works replicate it in UI5.

entry.title: Re: SAP PI/PO migration from any-DB (MS SQL server) to HA...
entry.content: For the write to the database (persist pipeline step, monitoring data) you won't gain huge performance improvement.  But I guess opening the monitoring transaction, especially if you are keeping more data in database persist could be quicker. But take into account, that SAP PI/PO runs out of maintenance in 2027 - so better to invest into replacement (e.g. to integration suite). Also please consider, DB needs to be licensed and usually SAP doesn't convert Oracle license in Hana licenses.

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hi,

I am a little late for this developer challenge. Please find my solution below.

2. Insert Logic to the Table

3. CDS View of the Table

Regards,

Santhosh Rajan

entry.title: Re: Using CDS ABAP code exit with unlimited character length
entry.content:
Using a calculated field has slightly changed (see here).

The field can be defined with:

            @ObjectModel.virtualElementCalculatedBy: 'ABAP:Z_MY_CALC_CLASS'
      virtual fieldString: z_my_data_element,

The element z_my_data_element can then be of tye string

entry.title: Re: Error F0 750 in F110
entry.content: After 10 years the thread might be dead but the problem can still occur in 2024. In my case the problem is a formally invalid email address, e.g. @ missing etc. It makes sense to verify the email address in the BTE function module before passing it to FINAA.

entry.title: Re: Error while sending out the (F110) payment advices by...
entry.content: After 10 years the thread might be dead but the problem can still occur in 2024. In my case the problem is a formally invalid email address, e.g. @ missing etc. It makes sense to verify the email address in the BTE function module before passing it to FINAA.

entry.title: WWI / chapter 14 / 3E Template
entry.content:
Hello

in reference to https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/3e-wwi-template-chapter-14/qaq-p/13790148

i realized a heavy use of "Stacks" of many kind. Can you explain they 3E tries to move a "Authorization group" of the specification to the StacK?  This is from my point of view not needed. Really strange logic.

Based on discussion with other experts in the background: we will raise anyhow a tickets at 3E as the docu as delivered is "strange" (for some of the generation variants).

C.B.

If it's critical for you, please create request in the SAP Customer Influence, where SAP Product expert will check that accordingly.

Best Regards,

Sean

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite Error - ScriptCollectionException -...
entry.content: Did you verify the referenced scripts in the child flow, as mentioned here: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003299415 ?

entry.title: Re: UDF Setup history item list BP ordered
entry.content:
Hi Mark,

try this

SELECT
	[RDR1].[ItemCode]
	,SUM([RDR1].[Quantity]) AS [Sum]
FROM
	[ORDR]
	INNER JOIN [RDR1] ON [RDR1].[DocEntry] = [ORDR].[DocEntry] 
WHERE
	[ORDR].[CardCode] = '$[$4.0.0]'
	AND
	[ORDR].[DocDate] Between DATEADD(dd,-180,GetDate()) AND GetDate() 
GROUP BY 
	[RDR1].[ItemCode]

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: Cloud Identity Services - Connectivity plan for 3 tier system landscape
entry.content: But still that would mean that you create connectivity from the connectivity plan subaccount to a mix of Dev, QAS and Prod backends. Please file an incident via SAP support and and ask for their opinion. At the end I think this will result in an influencing request.

entry.title: Re: How to parse an Employee Central ODATA into ABAP table
entry.content:
Hi Kenneth,

that depends on the format in which you receive the data. If you receive it as a JSON file, then you can simply convert it into an ABAP structure using the following method.

 

DATA lv_odata_json TYPE string. "your ODATA-JSON-String
DATA lt_abap_data TYPE ref to data. "here you can create a corresponding ABAP structure/table and use it here

TRY.
    /ui2/cl_json=>deserialize(
                    EXPORTING
                      json             = lv_odata_json
                    CHANGING
                      data             = lt_abap_data ).
CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error.
    "Error handling
ENDTRY.

 

It is also possible to create a dynamic structure, but it is better if you create a corresponding ABAP structure in ABAP and then transfer the string to your ABAP structure using the method mentioned above.

Regards
Jim

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence Hub - Myths and Misconceptions - Part 2 (Migration)
entry.content: @Antonis as far as I know there are no plans to allow changing the attribute type of an attribute. When you setup attributes you need to make sure you know which attribute type they belong to. If changes are required, you'd have to deactivate the attributes and import them again under a different attribute type.

entry.title: Re: CAP Build Code & Joule project deployment to CF
entry.content: I got the answer and was able to resolve it. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP typescript error "No call signatures"
entry.content: In your database query the `u.Assoc1to1(..)` is interpreted as a function call, which doesn't exist, hence typescript complains about it. The syntax you are using is to generate an expand query, not to call a function, so just disable the typescript validation for that line with `@ts-ignore`.

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Wien 05.09.2024
entry.content:
hi Mathias, die verlinkte blog-post-Seite "SAP Stammtisch Wien" spricht immer noch vom 1.8.2024.
LG
CHP

entry.title: Re: Release procedure configuration using standard workfl...
entry.content:
If you have 50 plants and 2 different approvers in each plant, then:
Create 50 different release groups and assign a different plant characteristic to each group.
Then create two codes - for a purchaser (first level) and a manager (second level)
You also need 100 different roles of approvers, each with a different release group authorization and either release code 1 or 2.
The number of release strategies (50 or 100) depends on whether you want to have a one-level approval or perhaps sometimes or always a two-level approval.

entry.title: Terraform Provider for SAP BTP version 1.6.0 - what’s new
entry.content:
Here we go again – welcome 1.6.0

Another month has passed, and I hope you had a great summer vacation. And as another month has passed, say welcome to the August release aka version 1.6.0 of the Terraform provider for SAP BTP is out. Let’s look at what has been added since the last release.

Of course, you also find all the information in the release notes in the GitHub repository:

Feature: Add timeout block for subaccount subscription

Up to now you had the option to configure timeouts for environments and service instances to avoid running into timeouts during the execution of your Terraform script.

We got the feedback that this is also needed for the resources of subscriptions. So here you go. With this release you can also define a timeout block when defining subscriptions in Terraform.

If you are already using this resource type, no worries, the change is backward compatible, so no changes needed in your existing configurations. They will behave the same as in the prior releases.

Feature: Add dashboard URL to service instance

Due to community feedback, we have been made aware that the field “dashboard_url” is missing as read-only attribute and this would be quite handy to have this. Well, with release 1.6.0 you have now also access to this field when creating the resource.

The documentation was updated accordingly: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest/docs/resources/subaccount_service_instance

Feature: Add retry logic for rate limit for entitlement

Some of our users reported that they ran into issues when setting up entitlements for bigger landscapes in CI/CD pipelines, so not only a lot of entitlements but also an execution in parallel. Due to many calls to the platform API triggered via the provider, the system ran into a rate limit error.

This error was propagated and consequently the execution of the Terraform run was aborted.

With release 1.6.0 we enhanced the implementation for entitlements to react a bit more sophisticated when an according error is raised by the underlying API. In detail the processing will not be aborted, but a retry loop is triggered. This should mitigate the issue of running into a rate limit-

Feature: Resource to manage XSUAA API Credentials

As you might know the Terraform provider for SAP BTP stands on the shoulder of the giant BTP CLI (BTP CLI server to be precise). The BTP CLI commands evolve and consequently we must then do the necessary adoptions on the Terraform side to get the new commands in as resources.

This release contains the results of the exercise for the BTP CLI command “security/api-credential” (https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/btp-cli-command-reference/security-api-credential). Version 1.6.0 contains the corresponding resources. You find all the details in the documentation:

  • Global Account: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest/docs/resources/globalaccount_api_credential
  • Directory: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest/docs/resources/directory_api_credential
  • Subaccount: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest/docs/resources/subaccount_api_credential

Fix: data source subaccount - empty placeholders in error message

Due to a glitch in the data source subaccount the error message template that was raised due to a wrong configuration was empty and one might say not a very big help for you to pin down the error in your Terraform configuration.

With release 1.6.0 the error template gets filled correctly and the error message now helps you in pinning down the issue as you would expect it.

How to update?

I guess you already know the drill, but anyhow. The update of the provider version is straightforward. Depending on your configuration in the provider, you must adjust the version constraint to 1.6.0 and execute a “terraform init -upgrade”.

That’s it.

You find the documentation of the enhanced resources in the Terraform registry: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest

Feedback, questions, bugs, feature requests

The procedure hasn’t change: if you want to interact with us, use the GitHub repository https://github.com/SAP/terraform-provider-btp:

  • To file a bug, please open an issue in the repository.
  • To file a feature request, please file it in the repository.
  • If you have a question, want to discuss ideas, or do some “show & tell”, feel free to start a GitHub Discussion.

There are also some feature requests open that you can vote for. Check for the issues that are label as “enhancement” and “pending decision“ via this link https://github.com/SAP/terraform-provider-btp/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Aenhancement+label%3Apending-decision.

What else?

You are certainly aware that we are also working on a Terraform provider for Cloud Foundry that you find here https://github.com/SAP/terraform-provider-cloudfoundry. The provider has already a quite mature state and the first release candidate is out. A Expect to see an update (a GA version???) around TechEd (I guess they call it “event-driven delivery” ;-)).  

We are also working on the functionality to make your life easier when it comes to do the Terraform import for landscapes (working Title Terraform Exporter) as described in this issue https://github.com/SAP/terraform-provider-btp/issues/724. We are making very good progress, so I hope to share some news soon.  

What is next?

Do you want a sneak peek at what is coming next and when we plan to deliver the next release? You find that information in the milestones on our GitHub repository https://github.com/SAP/terraform-provider-btp/milestones.

Be aware that plans and dates might change through the course of development.

With that … happy Terraforming!

entry.title: Re: Does CALM have digital signature ability similar to ChaRM in SolMan 7.2
entry.content: Unfortunately not, Electronic Signatures are not yet available.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
Re: Custom Tasks in Onboarding and Offboarding
entry.content: The custom task configured for a requirement which has days the candidate would like to work in a week has a loading issue when logged in as a HR ADMIN. Can someone please help on this.

entry.title: Re: Release procedure configuration using standard workfl...
entry.content: Thanks for your inputs. Is there any other standard way we can reduce this effort? How about the second option i mentioned?

entry.title: Re: Where is the Raylightsamples.lcmbiar file in SAP BO 4.3
entry.content:
No, this has nothing to do with RESTful API, what you are using here is BI Java SDK.
and the LCMBIAR contains the sample report and universes used as tests in the sample Java program.



See the Java code in the src directory, e.g. the file "ChangeSourceSample.java", which shows how to change the source universe in the document.
...

for RESTful API see "Business Intelligence Platform RESTful Web Service Developer Guide" https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESSOBJECTS_BUSINESS_INTELLIGENCE_PLATFORM/db6a17c0d1214fd6971de66ea0122378/45aadf606e041014910aba7db0e91070.html

entry.title: Cannot find type "MAINT_TEAM" in RSH app
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am using S/4 HANA 2022 version. I am trying to create and WC teams and responsibility and I want to use type "MAINT_TEAM"(Maintenance Work Center Team) but this option is not available in the dropdown list. This value should be available as a standard but I cannot find any. 

How do I get this value??

Thanks,

Shweta Gupta

entry.title: Re: Making employees recently increased in EC ineligible in compensation worksheets
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec,

Thank you so much for your quick response and for documenting the solution! 😊

entry.title: How to Notify me when password expired
entry.content:
Hello community , 

i need to  know if i can notify a user that his code is expiring in "N" days. (N=5 days for example)

I want to notify a user when Login In to the system if the password expiring in 5 Days , to Change it.

Can i do this ?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Release procedure configuration using standard workfl...
entry.content: Are you talking about 50 release codes? So you want to configure them and not create a prerequisite for each of them, so that theoretically a specific PR can be released by each code. Then you want to create 50 roles, each for a different code. But then how would you manage the workflow notifications? In the PR there is a plant in a workflow table, but in the PO we don't have that. Also, if you configure 50 release codes, you will see them all in every single document. This can be confusing. The release code is usually a release level and is not used to differentiate between characteristics. For this we have the release groups.

entry.title: Re: ABAP & http, why can’t we just have something nice?
entry.content:
Hi,

As already announced through the roadmap item

 Integration Services | SAP Help Portal "Outbound HTTP/RFC: Deployment-Independent Code" we have released the Communication Targets for HTTP with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.

A Communication Target is a new development object that enables content separation of application destinations. As soon as Communication Targets are also available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition or SAP S/4HANA  the same concept can be applied in all deployments for outbound HTTP communication.

For more information you can refer to the 2408 release note ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse: Communication Targets for HTTP Outbound Communication at What's New Viewer - SAP S/4HANA Cloud | SAP Help Portal and the documentation HTTP Communication via Communication Targets | SAP Help Portal.

Regards

Tatjana Pfeifer

entry.title: Re: India TCS Form 27EQ - Remmitance Challan Issue
entry.content:
Dear Moni123, can you please have a look at these resources in the screenshot, the screenshot is one paragraph of a larger post in the community: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/gst-india-tcs-solution/ba-p/13499648#common

Please let me know whether resolved your issue

Regards,

Axel

entry.title: Re: F110 change posting date
entry.content:
https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3353346

3353346 said that it is not possible to change posting date after executing the payment proposal.

entry.title: Batch Validation/check during Sales Delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

We have Requirement of that Expired batch and batch with shelf life less than 1 year should not pick during the batch determiantion in Sales Delivery.

How we can achive this in standard of public cloud?

entry.title: Re: Issue in delivery from project stock
entry.content: can we upload the note here

entry.title: Reverse kitting without BOM gives error - Wrong stock type
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts, 

We are setting up the VAS Reverse kitting process in our factory and the system is giving a weird error.

The process starts with a production order in which several products are assembled with some packagings to build a new product (we call it box).  Then, for some customers, this box has to be disassembled logically in the system as they ordered the products individually on the sales order (but requested the packaging task). So the users disassemble the box into the products and create pick-HUs for every box HU that was produced earlier. Then the Pick-HUs are shipped.

 For this second part of the process, we would like to implement reverse kitting, but when trying to create the VAS order without BOM (because the BOM for the box has assembly products and we cannot use it for reverse kitting without implementing a BADI to select the right BOM) the system shows an error related to stock type that makes no sense.

The customizing for VAS does not have F1 as stock type, it has I2.

Settings for order type for reverse kitting.

Can you please guide me on what could be wrong? Why is the system trying to use F1 instead of I2 stock?

Thank you in advance for your answers.

Regards

Iris Ladera

entry.title: Re: Release procedure configuration using standard workfl...
entry.content: The plant in the workflow table is only for PR and not PO. It is only used in PR release strategy if configured item wise release and not overall release. As a standard solution I understand it is feasible to create 50 different release groups and not release codes. However, my question was can we use option 2 using the customer exit to simplify instead of creating 50 different groups and strategies.

entry.title: Re: Can't found app "Manage Production Supply Areas"
entry.content:
Hi @Enda 

unfortunately these scope items are not available for our country version (Croatia). How can we proceed further?

Best regards,
